textByHash.3695fe1e03885e899f4a74a3b1d5d9937f88ee79: Can I help you, your Royal Highness?
textByHash.9ebebedbfed50faa83c76860bd47d71d19454225: There's no rain or wind down here.
textByHash.e13e06b3f6dfad366765b3bce40cc628607c3ba4: Some of the dwarves say that there's water in the other caves, and one of them says he's seen monsters in there.
textByHash.bbe1b45ff50ade6fd799645383b0cb4e4d26033f: I don't know, sorry. You'd better ask one of the dwarves about it.
textByHash.0f0522e7af8ef70269cee4ed327ec27563c834c8: How are you finding the Conch so far?
textByHash.aa5cd1fb865f73dcce3146c19a5f3a6a2fd2f61b: It is, isn't it? Still, I must admit, I'm keen to get out into the wider world. Coco and Torgan say it won't be long now until it's time for my Trial by Water.
textByHash.61037ba42d7781788604fa63eaecaa8c0b1e4f27: A lot drier in the winter than it is above ground.
